title: PC1 RTX 4090 Qwen3.5-27B DFlash validation
purpose: Verify whether z-lab DFlash draft gives quality-preserving speedup over bare Qwen3.5-27B on a single RTX 4090.

gates.quality: 5/5 prompts pass manual review and 3/3 repeats per prompt are stable at temperature=0; JSON parses; code is syntactically sane; no malformed imports/decorators/braces/early cutoff/nonsense tokens.
gates.speed: DFlash completion tok/s >= 1.5x baseline. 2.0x+ strong win; 1.3-1.5x marginal; <1.3x fail.
gates.reliability: No CUDA OOM, no vLLM crash, no request hangs, server survives all 30 total requests.

decision_rule: Pass only if quality, speed, and reliability all pass. Any quality corruption kills the DFlash lane regardless of tok/s.
